candidate_definitions.text: A Benchmark for Semantic Segmentation of Waterbody Images

This is the repository for the ATLANTIS. All waterbody labels are comprehensively described in [ATLANTIS Wiki](https://github.com/smhassanerfani/atlantis/wiki). This dataset was developed in the [iWERS](http://ce.sc.edu/goharian/) lab at the University of South Carolina.

candidate_glosses.text: This is the repository for the ATLANTIS. All waterbody labels are comprehensively described in [ATLANTIS Wiki](https://github.com/smhassanerfani/atlantis/wiki). This dataset was developed in the [iWERS](http://ce.sc.edu/goharian/) lab at the University of South Carolina.
